articles.description:
Amid March Madness, KFC is offering a deal where you can get either 10 Hot & Spicy wings for $10 or 20 wings for $20 through the KFC mobile app or website for a limited time.

KFC's Hot & Spicy Wings are marinated and double-breaded with its Extra Crispy breading. Prices vary, but six wings are normally $8.49 near me in Los Angeles, while 20 wings are $24.99.
Other national deals at KFC right now include:


$10 Tuesday - 8 pieces of fried chicken (leg and thighs) or 8 tenders for $10 on Tuesdays.
$20 Build-A-Bucket - 8 pieces of fried dark meat chicken or 8 tenders, plus 4 individual sides and 4 buttermilk biscuits for $20.


Photo via KFC.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: KFC Offers 10 Wings for $10 Deal

articles.description:
Sonic introduces the new Strawberry Horchata Cream Slush as a limited-time, spring offering for its slush menu.

The new drink features the chain's signature slush blended with vanilla soft serve, cinnamon-spiced horchata syrup, and strawberries. 
The Strawberry Horchata Cream Slush is only available in a 20-oz size for a suggested price of $3.99 at participating locations nationwide.
Photo via Sonic.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: New at Sonic: Strawberry Horchata Cream Slush

articles.description:
Pizza Hut updates its Hand-Tossed Crust with a new recipe and launches the new Space Jam x Triple Treat Box to celebrate the basketball movie's 30th anniversary (and coinciding with March Madness).

Pizza Hut's new Hand Tossed Crust marks the chain's first recipe update in over a decade. It features a "lighter, airier bite with just the right balance of softness and crisp." It's finished with the chain's Garlic-Parm Hut Blend (you can opt to get it without the seasoning). It's featured in a new $10 large 3-topping pizza deal and in the Space Jam x Triple Treat Box.
The new $10 large 3-topping pizza deal ($10.99 here in California) is a limited-time offer at participating locations nationwide, where you can get a large 3-topping pizza on new Hand-Tossed crust, Thin 'N Crispy, or Chicago Tavern Style. It replaces a similar deal that allowed up to five toppings.
The Space Jam x Triple Treat Box includes two medium 1-topping pizzas, breadsticks, and Cinnamon Sticks (other desserts are available for an additional charge) in a limited-edition Space Jam-themed box at participating locations. Pricing starts at $21.99 (it's $24.99 near me).



Photos via Pizza Hut.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Pizza Hut Introduces New Hand-Tossed Pizza Crust and Space Jam Triple Treat Box

articles.description:
Crumbl introduces the new Brookies & Cream Cookie featuring Oreo as part of this week's limited-time lineup from March 23 through March 28, 2026.

Here are the four desserts on this week's rotating menu at Crumbl:
- New Brookies & Cream Cookie featuring Oreo (pictured) - A whole Oreo cookie stuffed inside a warm brookie, topped with Oreo cookie pieces.
- Dubai Chocolate Brownie - A chilled fudge brownie with a kataifi and pistachio cream filling topped with a layer of milk chocolate and a drizzle of more pistachio cream.
- Cake Batter Blondie Cookie - A warm cake batter cookie packed with white drops, rimmed with rainbow sprinkles.
- Carrot Cake Cookie - A warm, spiced carrot cake topped with cream cheese frosting and a pecan garnish.
Photo via Crumbl.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Crumbl Bakes New Oreo Brookies & Cream Cookie

articles.description:
Taco Bell adds two new menu items with the launch of the Crispy Chicken Crunchwrap Slider and Cantina Chicken Rolled Quesadilla.

The Crispy Chicken Crunchwrap Slider (pictured) is now available for a limited time and features Crispy Chicken Nuggets, a three-cheese blend, pico de gallo, and either Creamy Chipotle or Jalapeno Honey Mustard sauce, folded in a warm flour tortilla in the same manner as Taco Bell's signature Crunchwrap Supreme, and then grilled. It carries a suggested price of $2.49.
The slider is also showcased in a $9 Discovery Luxe Cravings Box, which includes a Crispy Crunchwrap Slider, a Cheesy Gordita Crunch, a Nacho Cheese Doritos Locos Taco, Chips and Nacho Cheese Sauce, and a medium fountain drink.
The Cantina Chicken Rolled Quesadilla is a permanent menu item that features a double portion (compared to a Cantina Chicken Quesadilla) of slow-roasted Cantina Chicken, a three-cheese blend, and Creamy Chipotle sauce, rolled up in a warm flour tortilla and grilled. Reduced-fat sour cream and Avocado Verde Salsa are included on the side.
The Cantina Chicken Rolled Quesadilla is priced at $6.69 (may vary) and follows last fall's Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla.
Photo via Taco Bell.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: New at Taco Bell: Crispy Chicken Crunchwrap Slider and Cantina Chicken Rolled Quesadilla

articles.description:
Chick-fil-A launches the new Jalapeno Ranch Club Sandwich as a limited-time spring menu item. It's joined by new Strawberry Hibiscus beverages.

The Jalapeno Ranch Club Chicken Sandwich features a chicken filet (choose from Original, Spicy, or Grilled filets), pepper jack cheese, caramelized onion-flavored candied bacon strips, lettuce, tomato, and pickled jalapenos, served on a new buttermilk ranch bun.  A creamy jalapeno ranch sauce is included on the side.
Prices may vary, but here in Los Angeles, the Original Jalapeno Ranch Club Sandwich with an Original crispy-fried costs $10.29. The Spicy filet version costs $10.79, while the Grilled version costs $10.99.
Strawberry Hibiscus beverages come in four varieties:
- Strawberry Hibiscus & Sprite - Sprite mixed with strawberry and hibiscus flavors. 
- Strawberry Hibiscus Lemonade - A mix of regular or diet lemonade with strawberry and hibiscus flavors. 
- Strawberry Hibiscus Frosted Lemonade - Regular or diet lemonade mixed with Icedream frozen dairy dessert, plus strawberry and hibiscus flavors. 
- Strawberry Hibiscus Sunjoy - Lemonade and sweetened iced tea mixed with strawberry and hibiscus flavors.
Photo via Chick-fil-A.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: New Jalapeno Ranch Club Chicken Sandwich Arrives at Chick-fil-A

articles.description:
Burger King's new "Better" Whopper features some slight improvements, including a new bun, new mayo, and a clamshell box instead of a wrapper.

It's normally $7.99 in my area (Los Angeles), but I used the Whopper Wednesday deal to get it for $3.99. As an aside, the pricing at my local Burger King is a bit weird. A Whopper is $7.99, a Double Whopper is $9.19, and a Triple Whopper is $11.69. This means a second patty costs $1.20, while a third costs $2.40. Also, a Whopper Jr. is $4.59, but a Double Whopper Jr. (it's the same thing, only with a second patty) is $7.99(?!). That's $3.40 extra for a second small beef patty.



I ordered the Whopper cut in half with a beef patty that came fresh out of the broiler (it's an option when ordering through the app).



The new bun is the most noticeabl…
articles.title: Review: Burger King - New "Better" Whopper (2026)

articles.description:
Starbucks has rolled out its 2026 spring menu, and it features new flavors such as ube and toasted coconut, along with the return of lavender. Here's what you'll find on this year's spring menu:

- New Toasted Coconut Cream Cold Brew -  Starbucks Cold Brew with toasted coconut cream-flavored cold foam. 
- New Toasted Coconut Latte - Starbucks signature espresso, toasted coconut-flavored syrup, and milk. Available hot or iced. 
Both Toasted Coconut Syrup and Toasted Coconut Cream Cold Foam are permanent menu additions.
- New Iced Ube Coconut Macchiato - Toasted Coconut Syrup, milk, and espresso over ice, topped with Ube Coconut Cream Cold Foam and toasted coconut flakes. While it's available, the Ube Coconut Cream Cold Foam can be added to any iced beverage.
- A new chai recipe that allows for customization in terms of sweetness and spice levels. It's made with a blend of black tea, warming spices (including cinnamon, clove, cardamom, and ginger), and a hint of honey. Specifically, you can adjust the amount of chai and classic syrup in your chai latte. You can also add flavors and toppings as you like (for an extra charge). The previous chai concentrate was pre-sweetened with sugar, while the new chai concentrate is only lightly sweetened with honey.
- New Iced Lavender Cream Chai - Chai concentrate, classic syrup, and milk, served over ice and topped with Lavender Cream Cold Foam.
- Lavender Latte -Starbucks Blonde Espresso Roast, milk, and lavender powder. Available hot or iced. 
- Lavender Creme Frappuccino - Lavender powder blended with vanilla syrup, milk, and ice, topped with whipped cream. 
- Iced Lavender Cream Matcha - Matcha, classic syrup, and milk, served over ice and topped with Lavender Cream Cold Foam.
- New Frog Cake Pop - A ball of vanilla cake mixed with buttercream, dipped in green chocolatey icing, and decorated in a frog design.
Starbucks will also be introducing the new Iced Mango Cream Matcha later this spring.
Photo via Starbucks.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Starbucks Introduces 2026 Spring Menu

articles.description:
Jimmy John's adds new gyros to the menu for a limited time nationwide. The chain's Greek-inspired sandwiches come in two varieties: the Greek Gyro and Chicken Gyro. A new Greek Cucumber Salad is also available as a side.

The Greek Gyro features seasoned gyro meat (a blend of beef and lamb), lettuce, tomato, cucumber, onion, and tzatziki sauce, wrapped in a warm pita.
The Chicken Gyro consists of gyro-seasoned chicken, lettuce, tomato, cucumbers, onion, and tzatziki, wrapped in a warm pita 
The Greek Cucumber Salad is a mix of cucumbers, tzatziki, sliced pickles, and onions
Prices vary, but my local Jimmy John's sells both Gyros for $11.69 and charges $4.99 for the Greek Cucumber Salad.
Photo via Jimmy John's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Jimmy Johns Debuts New Gyros

articles.description:
Dairy Queen will be celebrating its annual Free Cone Day on Thursday, March 19, 2026, at participating locations nationwide.

According to a survey conducted by Dairy Queen, "92% of Americans say a free DQ cone would make them happy." The chain gave away 5 million free cones last year.
During the promotion, you can snag a free small vanilla cone at participating non-mall locations in the US, while supplies last. Mall locations will require a purchase.
Photo via Dairy Queen.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Free Cone Day at Dairy Queen on March 19, 2026

articles.description:
As a 2026 March Madness promotion, Applebee's is offering a deal where you can get 50-cent boneless wings through March 22, 2026, and again from April 4 through April 6, 2026.

The 50-cent boneless wings deal is only available for takeout or delivery when ordered through the Applebee's website or mobile app.
Applebee's Boneless Wings feature crispy-fried breaded pieces of boneless chicken, plain or tossed in a sauce of choice, including Classic Buffalo, Honey BBQ, Sweet Asian Chile, Garlic Parmesan, Extra Hot Buffalo, and Hot Honey Glaze. Bleu cheese or house-made buttermilk ranch dressing is included for dipping.
Photo via Applebee's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Applebee's Offers 50-Cent Boneless Wings Through March 22, 2026 and from April 4 through April 6, 2026

articles.description:
Bojangles launches its new Triple Double Biscuit and Iced Coffee.

The Triple Double Biscuit is a limited-time, basketball-themed breakfast sandwich (because the college basketball season is coming to a close) that features applewood-smoked bacon, scrambled eggs, country-style sauce, and two slices of American cheese, served on a scratch-made buttermilk biscuit. The idea here is that the sandwich has "triple the protein" and "double the cheese" (a triple-double in basketball refers to when a player accumulates double-digit numbers in three different tracked statistics; most commonly points, rebounds, and assists).
Bojangles' new Iced Coffee is a permanent menu addition that's available in three flavors: Plain (with or without sweet cream), French Vanilla, and Salted Caramel.
Also here for a limited time is the returning Strawberry Cobbler (strawberry topping and icing over a buttermilk biscuit), a 2-for-$5 deal on Country Ham Biscuits, and the seasonal Bojangler Sandwich.
Photo via Bojangles.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Bojangles Launches New Triple Double Biscuit and Iced Coffee

articles.description:
Carl's Jr. launches the new Western Bacon Chicken Sandwich as a crispy-chicken sandwich analogue to its signature Western Bacon Cheeseburger. The chain has also revealed an updated dipping sauce lineup for its Hand-Breaded Chicken Tenders starting April 8, 2026.

Available for a limited time through May 12, 2026, the new sandwich features hand-breaded, crispy-fried chicken filet served with two cherrywood bacon strips, American cheese, crispy onion rings, and Western Barbecue sauce on a toasted sesame seed bun. It's the same as a Western Bacon Cheeseburger, only with a fried-chicken filet instead of a beef patty.
The Western Bacon Chicken Sandwich is priced at $5.99 at participating locations (the price is especially nice here in Los Angeles, where the regular Carl's Jr. Hand-Breaded Chicken Sandwich costs $11.19).
Starting April 8, 2026, the updated chicken tender dipping sauce lineup will include several sauces featured in the chain's burgers and sandwiches, as well as a new sauce and an updated one. The lineup includes:


Diablo Habanero Ranch from the El Diablo Burger.
Santa Fe from the Charbroiled Santa Fe Chicken Sandwich.
Western Barbecue from the Western Bacon Cheeseburger.
New Garlic Parmesan - "Creamy, herby, and cheesy."
New Heinz Ranch - "Cool and tangy."  


The current dipping sauce lineup includes Ranch, Sweet & Bold BBQ, and Buffalo Sauce.    
Photo via Carl's Jr.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Carl's Jr. Welcomes New Western Bacon Chicken Sandwich

articles.description:
Calling it the "Spring Chicken" deal, Shake Shack is offering a limited-time deal where you can get a free Chicken Shack or Chicken Shack Lettuce Wrap with an order of $10 or more through April 1, 2026.

The deal is good only for orders placed through the Shake Shack website, app, or in-restaurant kiosk using the code "SPRINGCHICKEN".
The chain continues to offer its Chicken Sunday deal through June 28, 2026, which is the same deal but only available on Sundays.
Shake Shack's Chicken Shack features a crispy-fried chicken breast filet, lettuce, pickles, and buttermilk herb mayo on a toasted potato bun. Prices vary, but it normally costs $9.49 here in Los Angeles.
Photo via Shake Shack.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Shake Shack Offers Free Chicken Shack with $10+ Purchase Through April 1, 2026

articles.description:
Einstein Bros. Bagels leans into the hot honey trend with the launch of its new Hot Honey Cream Cheese Shmear.

The new schmear offers a sweet and spicy twist to classic menu items, including:
- Hot Honey Egg Sandwich - Eggs, cheddar cheese, bacon, and Hot Honey Cream Cheese Shmear served on a fresh-baked bagel.
- Hot Honey Nova Lox Bagel - Cold smoked salmon, red onions, capers, cucumbers, Onion & Chive Cream Cheese Shmear, and Hot Honey Cream Cheese Shmear on a fresh-baked bagel.
You can also get Hot Honey Cream Cheese Shmear on a bagel of your choice.
Hot honey is a trending ingredient that has recently featured on the menu at McDonald's, Wingstop, and more.
In addition to the new menu offerings, Einstein Bros. also has several limited-time deals available, including:
- $10 Baker Dozen & Shmear Box (March Madness deal) - Available when ordering online from the Einstein Bros. Bagels website or app, it includes 13 bagels and two shmear tubs for $10.
- $8 Breakfast & Brew - The chain continues to offer this breakfast deal, which includes a Build-Your-Own-Egg Sandwich and large hot or iced coffee for $8.
